headline.text: L1 Sollich 3 enrober went down for *3 hours* on high pressure — full reheat cleared it by 18:02.

per_plant_summary.L1: Sollich 3 had a chocolate supply gap that required slowing to 60rr and switching from 10226 to 10200, then went down at 14:39 for a full reheat after the riser pump failed on high pressure — maintenance found 30 pounds of cold chocolate buildup and cleared it by 18:02. Sollich 2 ran clean with one brief scraper cleaning pause.
per_plant_summary.L2: No activity in the last 24 hours.
per_plant_summary.L3: Molding Line 1 ran through the shift but flagged air leaks on packaging in two separate water tests — 3 of 5 bars at 13:04 and 4 of 10 at 15:42. MFM had a product sensor failure that cleared by 08:35 and a brief foreign material stop after finding two caramel twist wraps in the line — corrective inspection completed.

resolved.title: Sollich 3 enrober riser pump failed on high pressure
resolved.summary: Riser pump would not start, alarm showed high chocolate pressure at turbotemper inlet, required full reheat and cleaning.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 18:02 — line restarted after full reheat; maintenance found 30 pounds cold chocolate buildup in screw drive and nuts in wire belt (Dakota Adair).

resolved.title: Sollich 3 chocolate supply shortage
resolved.summary: Warehouse out of 10226 chocolate with driver 90 minutes away, only 15 boxes left, risked MT temperature issues.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 14:11 — slowed line to 60rr, switched work order to 10200 chocolate per matrix compatibility, 12 pallets of 10226 still en route (Nathan Topham, Paula Pena).

resolved.title: Sollich 2 almond bedding weight high
resolved.summary: Almond weight running above target, needed adjustment to bedding thickness.
resolved.resolution: Cleared by 13:33 — bedding thinned out, subsequent weight checks in range, "Great work bringing down the almond weights!" (Justin Garner).

resolved.title: MFM product sensor failing
resolved.summary: Sensor that reads product failed during first shift, maintenance worked the issue and restored function.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 08:35 — "This got fixed at 8:35am, the line is running" (Itzel Chavez).

resolved.title: Foreign material found in MFM line during production
resolved.summary: Two pieces of caramel twist wrap detected in line during caramel cups run, required stop and full inspection.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 15:45 — matrix emptied, product verified, upstream areas re-checked to ensure compliance (Lorena Abreu).

resolved.title: MFM date ticket printer not working
resolved.summary: Printer stopped producing date tickets during changeover, blocking label production.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 12:37 — "Done, the printer is ok" (Fredy Montalvan).

needs_attention.title: ML1 packaging air leaks detected in water tests
needs_attention.summary: Two separate vacuum tests flagged seal failures — 3 of 5 bars at midshift, then 4 of 10 at 15:42 with leaks at flow-wrap corners.
needs_attention.status: Line leader notified at 13:04; issue persisted into second shift with 4 of 10 pieces showing small leaks at corners as of 15:42.
